Package org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie

Interface CheckpointSource.Checkpoint

All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<CheckpointSource.Checkpoint>
Enclosing interface:
CheckpointSource
public static interface CheckpointSource.Checkpoint extends Comparable<CheckpointSource.Checkpoint>
A checkpoint presented a time point. All entries added before this checkpoint are already persisted.
